===={{g|Scarlet and Violet}}====
=====First battle=====
Winning this battle is not mandatory. The player will not [[black out]] and the story will progress either way, with different dialogue depending on the outcome of the battle.

{{Party
| background = {{violet color}}
| border = {{violet color dark}}
| headcolor = {{violet color light}}
| sprite = VSArven {{rand/2|V|S}}.png
| size = x75px
| prize = {{PDollar}}300
| class = Pokémon Trainer
| name = Arven
| location = Poco Path
| game = SV
| pokemon = 1
}}
{{Pokémon
| gen = 9
| ndex = 0819
| pokemon = Skwovet
| gender = male
| level = 5
| type1 = Normal
| ability = Cheek Pouch
| move1 = Tackle | move1type = Normal | move1cat = Physical
| move2 = Tail Whip | move2type = Normal | move2cat = Status
| move3 = Bite | move3type = Dark | move3cat = Physical
}}
{{Party/end}}

=====Titan Multi Battle partner=====
Arven joins the {{player}} as a [[Multi Battle]] partner against five different [[Titan Pokémon]] in no set order.

Arven will always send out {{p|Mabosstiff}} last and {{Tera}}stallize it at the first opportunity.

=====[[Rematch]]=====
Arven will always send out {{p|Mabosstiff}} last and {{Tera}}stallize it at the first opportunity.

Arven uses the same team for the [[Academy Ace Tournament]] and [[League Club Room]] battles. The level of his team increases with the player's progress. Excluding his initial team, they are:
* Lv. 75-76 after completing [[The Indigo Disk]] and winning the Academy Ace Tournament for the first time
* Lv. 82-83 after completing [[Mochi Mayhem]]

=====Traded to the player=====
Upon the third unique interaction with Arven in the League Club Room, he will trade a Skwovet to the player in exchange for almost any Pokémon excluding {{Shiny}}, {{pkmn2|Legendary}}, or [[Mythical Pokémon]].

{{SVievent
|ndex=0819
|ball=Poké
|pokemon=Skwovet
|gender=f
|level=7
|teratype=Fighting
|type=Normal
|ot=Arven
|id=105971
|ability=Gluttony
|nature=Gentle
|met=a Link Trade
|ribbon=Partner
|hpiv=14
|atkiv=12
|defiv=22
|spaiv=23
|spdiv=22
|speiv=10
|move1=Counter|move1type=Fighting|move1cat=Physical
|move2=Bullet Seed|move2type=Grass|move2cat=Physical
|move3=Super Fang|move3type=Normal|move3cat=Physical
|move4=Belch|move4type=Poison|move4cat=Special
|method=[[In-game trade]] (League Club Room)
|scale=128
|trade=yes
|gift=yes}}
